new: Drop sets — chain weight × reps drops onto any set with a + Drop set link
Circuits — set a Rounds count on a superset to pre-create extra cycles
improved: CSV export includes a drop_chain column with the full drop sequence

new: Supersets — pair exercises in a routine and see them grouped in your workout
Rest button on each exercise so you can start the timer manually
improved: Rest timer now auto-starts only when you tap + Add set (was firing on every edit)
Plate calculator wording — Total weight + Empty machine weight, with help text explaining each
Body diagram cards say "6 of 12 target sets" instead of a bare "6 / 12"

new: Plate calculator with bar and gym profiles
Rest timer that auto-starts after each set
Suggested next set, rounded to a weight you can actually load
Body diagram with weekly muscle volume
Injury mode with substitute exercise suggestions
Log past workouts and edit the duration of any finished workout
Create custom exercises that work with everything
CSV and JSON data export
improved: Auto-fill from your last session is now shown inline above each exercise

new: Routines with per-exercise set and rep targets
Set logging with auto-fill from your previous workout
Calendar with weekly muscle-group rollup
Per-exercise progress charts
Personal records detected automatically
Workout history and detail view
Anonymous cross-device sync — no login required
Light and dark themes, fully offline
